data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Perlis & Kedah, Penang, Perak, Selangor, N. Sembilan, Melaka, Johor, Pahang, Terengganu and Eastern Sabah until 5:00PM; Wednesday, 24 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Perlis & Kedah, Pulau Pinang, Perak, Selangor, N. Sembilan, Melaka, Johor, Pahang, Terengganu dan Sabah Timur sehingga 5:00 petang; Rabu, 24 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of eastern part of Phuket, Straits of Melaka, Samui, Tioman, Condore, northwestern part of Bunguran, Reef North, Layang-Layang, Palawan and Sulu until 5:00PM; Wednesday, 24 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan timur Phuket, Selat Melaka, Samui, Tioman, Condore, barat laut Bunguran, Reef North, Layang-Layang, Palawan dan Sulu sehingga 5:00 petang; Rabu, 24 Jun 2026.

data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (First Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 40-50 kmph with wave height up to 3.5 metres are expected over the waters of Phuket until Saturday, 27 June 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Pertama)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 40-50 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 3.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Phuket sehingga Sabtu, 27 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the states of  Perak ;  Kelantan  (Jeli, Kuala Krai and Gua Musang);  Terengganu ;  Pahang ;  Selangor ;  FT Kuala Lumpur ;  FT Putrajaya ;  Negeri Sembilan ; and  Johor  (Segamat, Kluang, Mersing, Pontian, Kulai, Kota Tinggi and Johor Bahru) until 6:00PM; Wednesday, 24 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di negeri  Perak ;  Kelantan  (Jeli, Kuala Krai dan Gua Musang);  Terengganu ;  Pahang ;  Selangor ;  WP Kuala Lumpur ;  WP Putrajaya ;  Negeri Sembilan ; dan  Johor  (Segamat, Kluang, Mersing, Pontian, Kulai, Kota Tinggi dan Johor Bahru) sehingga 6:00 petang; Rabu, 24 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: No Tropical Cyclone system is observed under MMD monitoring region (Latitude: 0-20 North & Longitude: 95-130 East)
data.text_bm: Tiada sistem Siklon Tropika dicerap di dalam kawasan pemantauan MMD (Latitud: 0-20 Utara & Longitud: 95-130 Timur)
